message:
feat(e2e): reservations, beads, and notifications E2E tests

Add comprehensive E2E test suite covering coordination features:
- Beads CRUD (create, list, triage, quick-wins) + UI table validation
- File reservations (create, check, conflict detection, release)
- Notifications (create, list, mark-read, preferences, test delivery)
- Cross-feature integration (dashboard consistency, logging capture)

18 tests with full logging framework diagnostics.

Closes bd-1vr1.13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
